Video.summary: Jump Street investigates a death at a camp for teenaged discipline problems.
Video.title: This Ain't No Summer Camp

Video.summary: Jump Street investigates the death of a popular high school football player.
Video.title: The Girl Next Door

Video.summary: When college students who buy term papers are being blackmailed, Jump Street is called to investigate.
Video.title: Diplomas For Sale

Video.summary: Jump Street investigates the rape of a college student after the reporter of the crime seems to disappear.
Video.title: The Education Of Terry Carver

Video.summary: After killing someone in the line of duty, Joey gets an unusual assignment to help him recover from the trauma
Video.title: Baby Blues

Video.summary: McCann is assigned to controversial missing persons case and uncovers a blackmail scheme.
Video.title: Film At Eleven

Video.summary: McCann is ordered to seduce the daughter of a prominent drug dealer to gather evidence against her father.
Video.title: In The Name Of Love

Video.summary: Fuller is tom when the son of a woman he is dating is suspected of beating and robbing elderly people.
Video.title: Coppin' Out / Cop Love

Video.summary: McCann investigates a devil worshipping cult at a local high school.
Video.title: Under The Influence

Video.summary: Fuller worries Hoffs new boyfriend is taking advantage; Hoffs is sued when an arrest is thrown out by the D.A.
Video.title: Crossfire

Video.summary: Investigating a student terrorist organization, Hanson and Penhall pursue a suspect on a spring break trip.
Video.title: Awomp-Bomp-Aloobomb, Aloop Bamboom

Video.summary: Hanson and Penhall head to El Salvador to find Penhall's missing wife and get caught in the local crossfire.
Video.title: La Bizca

Video.summary: While investigating a series of robberies, Hanson and Penhall encounter a teen girl hiding her baby sister.
Video.title: Last Chance High

Video.summary: After the rape of a student in a wheelchair, Hoffs investigation conflicts with a handicapped officer's desire
Video.title: Unfinished Business

Video.summary: A battle between neo-Nazis and a community organizer set on keeping his neighborhood free of their influence.
Video.title: Shirts And Skins / A New Breeze Blowing

Image.alt: Shirts And Skins / A New Breeze Blowing
Shirts And Skins / A New Breeze Blowing
Shirts And Skins / A New Breeze Blowing
Shirts And Skins / A New Breeze Blowing
Shirts And Skins / A New Breeze Blowing
Shirts And Skins / A New Breeze Blowing
Shirts And Skins / A New Breeze Blowing
Shirts And Skins / A New Breeze Blowing
Shirts And Skins / A New Breeze Blowing

Video.summary: After a senator's life is threatened, the Jump Street crew recall their version of the incident to a reporter.
Video.title: How I Saved The Senator

Video.summary: Penhall is coaxed into becoming a little league baseball coach, a young team member is kidnapped by his father
Video.title: Rounding Third

Video.summary: New officer Dean Garrett is befriended by Penhall while on assignment at a highly corrupt police station.
Video.title: Everyday Is Christmas

Video.summary: Jump Street investigates a rape by a gang of high school students.
Video.title: Blackout

Video.summary: The Jump Street team stumbles onto a federal investigation of drugs and prostitution.
Video.title: Tunnel Of Love

Video.summary: When they pose as high schoolers, Kati reveals she is a drop out, and Garrett's strange brother comes to visit
Video.title: Back To School

Video.summary: To find a killer, Jump Street's newest befriends a mentally disabled witness, but angers Hoffs and Penhall.
Video.title: Buddy System

Video.summary: Doug falls for an undercover narcotics cop assigned to Jump Street, only to discover she has a drug problem.
Video.title: Poison

Video.summary: Forced to take a drug test while on an undercover assignment, Hoffs tests positive and is suspended.
Video.title: Just Say No! High

Video.summary: To the dismay of his brother, Joey Penhall joins Jump Street and is brainwashed during an assignment.
Video.title: Brothers

Video.summary: While investigating payoffs at a college radio station, Doug is shot and lays dying in the hospital.
Video.title: Number One With A Bullet

Video.summary: Hoffs sets out to expose a racism in a police gang unit.
Video.title: Equal Protection
